ceh_landcover_broadleaved_woodland.name: Broadleaved woodland
ceh_landcover_broadleaved_woodland.description: CEH Land Cover Map; broadleaved woodland (values often 0–10000 proportional scale).

ceh_landcover_coniferous_woodland.name: Coniferous woodland
ceh_landcover_coniferous_woodland.description: CEH Land Cover Map; coniferous woodland.

ceh_landcover_arable.name: Arable
ceh_landcover_arable.description: CEH Land Cover Map; arable agriculture.

ceh_landcover_improved_grassland.name: Improved grassland
ceh_landcover_improved_grassland.description: CEH Land Cover Map; improved grassland.

ceh_landcover_upland_heathland.name: Upland heath
ceh_landcover_upland_heathland.description: CEH Land Cover Map; upland heathland.

vom_vegetation_height_mean.name: Mean vegetation height
vom_vegetation_height_mean.description: Vegetation Object Model (VOM) 2022; mean vegetation / canopy height above ground (m).

vom_vegetation_height_min.name: Minimum vegetation height
vom_vegetation_height_min.description: VOM 2022; minimum vegetation height in the cell (m).

vom_vegetation_height_max.name: Maximum vegetation height
vom_vegetation_height_max.description: VOM 2022; maximum vegetation height in the cell (m).

vom_vegetation_height_std.name: Vegetation height variability
vom_vegetation_height_std.description: VOM 2022; standard deviation of vegetation height within the cell (m).

terrain_stats_slope.name: Slope
terrain_stats_slope.description: Terrain slope from DEM (dimensionless rise/run or project-specific definition).

terrain_stats_aspect_eastness.name: East–west aspect
terrain_stats_aspect_eastness.description: Terrain aspect eastness component (east–west orientation; often sin-aspect).

terrain_stats_aspect_northness.name: North–south aspect
terrain_stats_aspect_northness.description: Terrain aspect northness component (north–south orientation; often cos-aspect).

terrain_stats_twi.name: Topographic wetness index
terrain_stats_twi.description: TWI: tendency for water to accumulate from upslope; higher values often wetter sites.

terrain_stats_curvature.name: Curvature
terrain_stats_curvature.description: Terrain profile or plan curvature from DEM.

terrain_stats_roughness.name: Surface roughness
terrain_stats_roughness.description: Terrain surface roughness / local relief variation.

terrain_stats_tpi.name: Topographic position
terrain_stats_tpi.description: Topographic position index (TPI): elevation relative to neighbourhood (ridge vs valley tendency).

terrain_stats_aspect_eastness_slope.name: East–west aspect × slope
terrain_stats_aspect_eastness_slope.description: Interaction: aspect eastness multiplied by slope.

terrain_stats_aspect_northness_slope.name: North–south aspect × slope
terrain_stats_aspect_northness_slope.description: Interaction: aspect northness multiplied by slope.

terrain_dtm.name: Ground elevation
terrain_dtm.description: Digital terrain model (DTM): bare-earth elevation (m, British National Grid / project CRS).

terrain_dsm.name: Surface elevation
terrain_dsm.description: Digital surface model (DSM): includes vegetation and buildings (m).

os_cover_major_roads.name: Major roads (cover)
os_cover_major_roads.description: Ordnance Survey-derived layer: presence or fractional cover of major roads.

os_distance_distance_to_major_roads.name: Distance to major roads
os_distance_distance_to_major_roads.description: Straight-line distance to the nearest major road (m).

os_distance_distance_to_minor_roads.name: Distance to minor roads
os_distance_distance_to_minor_roads.description: Straight-line distance to the nearest minor road (m).

os_distance_distance_to_woodland.name: Distance to woodland
os_distance_distance_to_woodland.description: Straight-line distance to the nearest woodland (m).

os_distance_distance_to_water.name: Distance to open water
os_distance_distance_to_water.description: Straight-line distance to the nearest open water (m).

os_distance_distance_to_buildings.name: Distance to buildings
os_distance_distance_to_buildings.description: Straight-line distance to the nearest building (m).

climate_stats_temp_ann_var.name: Annual temperature variability
climate_stats_temp_ann_var.description: Climate summary: variation in temperature across years (project-specific climate stack).

climate_stats_temp_ann_avg.name: Annual mean temperature (climate summary)
climate_stats_temp_ann_avg.description: Climate summary: long-term annual mean temperature from the project climate stack (distinct from Bioclim BIO1 if both are present).

climate_stats_temp_mat_avg.name: Mean annual temperature (MAT)
climate_stats_temp_mat_avg.description: Climate summary: mean annual temperature (MAT); may overlap with other temperature layers—check your pipeline.

climate_stats_prec_ann_var.name: Annual precipitation variability
climate_stats_prec_ann_var.description: Climate summary: variation in precipitation across years.

climate_stats_prec_ann_avg.name: Mean annual precipitation (climate summary)
climate_stats_prec_ann_avg.description: Climate summary: long-term annual mean precipitation from the project climate stack (distinct from Bioclim BIO12 if both are present).

climate_stats_wind_ann_var.name: Annual wind variability
climate_stats_wind_ann_var.description: Climate summary: variation in wind speed across years.

climate_stats_wind_ann_avg.name: Mean annual wind speed
climate_stats_wind_ann_avg.description: Climate summary: long-term annual mean wind speed.

climate_bioclim_bio_1.name: Annual mean temperature (Bioclim)
climate_bioclim_bio_1.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO1: annual mean temperature.

climate_bioclim_bio_2.name: Mean daily temperature range
climate_bioclim_bio_2.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO2: mean diurnal range (mean of monthly max − min temperature).

climate_bioclim_bio_4.name: Temperature seasonality
climate_bioclim_bio_4.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO4: temperature seasonality (SD of monthly temperatures × 100).

climate_bioclim_bio_5.name: Max. temperature (warmest month)
climate_bioclim_bio_5.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO5: maximum temperature of the warmest month.

climate_bioclim_bio_6.name: Min. temperature (coldest month)
climate_bioclim_bio_6.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO6: minimum temperature of the coldest month.

climate_bioclim_bio_7.name: Annual temperature range
climate_bioclim_bio_7.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO7: temperature annual range (BIO5 − BIO6).

climate_bioclim_bio_8.name: Mean temperature (wettest quarter)
climate_bioclim_bio_8.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO8: mean temperature of the wettest quarter.

climate_bioclim_bio_9.name: Mean temperature (driest quarter)
climate_bioclim_bio_9.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO9: mean temperature of the driest quarter.

climate_bioclim_bio_10.name: Mean temperature (warmest quarter)
climate_bioclim_bio_10.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO10: mean temperature of the warmest quarter.

climate_bioclim_bio_11.name: Mean temperature (coldest quarter)
climate_bioclim_bio_11.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO11: mean temperature of the coldest quarter.

climate_bioclim_bio_12.name: Annual precipitation (Bioclim)
climate_bioclim_bio_12.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO12: total annual precipitation.

climate_bioclim_bio_13.name: Precipitation (wettest month)
climate_bioclim_bio_13.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO13: precipitation of the wettest month.

climate_bioclim_bio_14.name: Precipitation (driest month)
climate_bioclim_bio_14.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO14: precipitation of the driest month.

climate_bioclim_bio_15.name: Precipitation seasonality
climate_bioclim_bio_15.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO15: precipitation seasonality (coefficient of variation).

climate_bioclim_bio_16.name: Precipitation (wettest quarter)
climate_bioclim_bio_16.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO16: precipitation of the wettest quarter.

climate_bioclim_bio_17.name: Precipitation (driest quarter)
climate_bioclim_bio_17.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO17: precipitation of the driest quarter.

climate_bioclim_bio_18.name: Precipitation (warmest quarter)
climate_bioclim_bio_18.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO18: precipitation of the warmest quarter.

climate_bioclim_bio_19.name: Precipitation (coldest quarter)
climate_bioclim_bio_19.description: WorldClim Bioclim BIO19: precipitation of the coldest quarter.

bgs_coast_distance_to_coast.name: Distance to coast
bgs_coast_distance_to_coast.description: Distance to the sea along the mapped coastline (British Geological Survey / coastline layer; m).
